results.title: Lunair: Generate studio-quality explainer videos. Instantly. | Product Hunt
results.content:
What needs improvement

I’d love to see deeper brand controls and more advanced customization options as the platform grows. The foundation is very strong, and expanding these areas could make it an essential tool for creative teams.

Guy Manzur
Lunair

Lunair

@shiran\_waldman Happy to hear this coming from a fellow designer.

Of course, branding and asset management is a necessary feature that will be available in the near future.

Shahmeer Baloch
Guy Manzur
Lunair

Lunair

@shahmeer\_baloch1 Sharing images should indeed be enough. For now, it's not possible to upload videos anyway, but images are definitely enough [...] Guy Manzur
Lunair

Lunair

@guyman  @chrismessina Thanks a lot Chris, really value your take on this!

Shiran Waldman

As a designer, I’ve created more explainer videos than I can count, and the process is usually slow, expensive, and creatively limiting. Lunair genuinely surprised me. Within minutes, I was able to generate a video that actually felt on-brand, structured, and intentional, not like another generic AI output.

What stood out most was the balance between automation and control. You’re not fighting the tool, you’re directing it. The workflow is clear, the results are polished, and the time-to-value is exceptional.

What needs improvement [...] 2

53

Lir 

#### What's great

Lunair is super easy to use and delivers really high-quality, precise results. As a UI/UX designer, I use it a lot to create website explainers, and the level is genuinely impressive, especially for such a small cost. What used to take me much longer now takes less than half an hour.

#### What needs improvement

There’s tons of room to grow with new features and integrations. The foundation is strong, and it feels like there’s a lot more exciting potential ahead.

#### vs Alternatives

The process is very straightforward. It honestly doesn’t even feel like you’re using a video editing tool. It’s simple, clear, and makes sense, even if you have absolutely no experience with video.

Hili Giladi

#### What's great

When I tried to refresh, it said I might lose some progress, which I didn't want because I worked hours to make this video. After another few minutes or probably an hour, it still didn't work, so I gave in and refreshed. 4. Also, the watermark. They made it BIGGER now, and they even removed the option to have a few watermark-free videos every month without premium. Like that is so stupid to remove it.. 5. Also, you now cannot record videos longer than 15 minutes on the camera option which is useless anyway because you cant export anything more than 4 MINUTES. 6. Also, this site makes my whole Chromebook freeze. It might sound like a "me" [...] 1. First off, so expensive. If you want to keep more than THREE videos, JUST THREE at one time, you have to pay, which is dumb. At least it is better than only having your videos in for only three days until it gets deleted, right? Right, but NOW you can only have three videos at a time AND you can only have them in for THREE DAYS. Insanely stupid. Also, they are so money thirsty. 2. If you make audio or a video, it will purposely chip and mess with the audio/video. There is also a feature called 'Clean Audio' that costs money but it is literally just your original audio.
